title: [Release] 1.8.0 mega-PR + tag
description: After ALL 1.8.0 tasks (TASK-001 through TASK-036, plus TASK-041 docs) land on release/v1.8.0-stabilization with commit-per-task history, open mega-PR to main with comprehensive description summarizing per-Layer changes. After merge: tag v1.8.0; bump packages/*/package.json + root to 1.8.0; publish.

files.change: git push origin release/v1.8.0-stabilization; gh pr create --base main --title '1.8.0 stabilization release' --body (summary of all Layer 0/1/2 changes + ~950 LoC + 2 release model)
Move unreleased to 1.8.0 with date stamp

criteria: Mega-PR opened with clear by-Layer description
All 36 1.8.0 task commits visible in commit history
After PR merge: tag v1.8.0; packages published
